title: Orders
description: Track, cancel, or manage your orders on Cureza.

faqs.q: How do I track my order?
faqs.a: You can track your order via the "My Orders" section. Updates are also sent on SMS and email.

faqs.q: Why is my order stuck on processing?
faqs.a: Since Cureza is a multi-vendor marketplace, some vendors require extra time for stock confirmation.

faqs.q: My tracking link is not updating. What should I do?
faqs.a: Tracking may take 12–24 hours to update. If still not updated, contact support at help@cureza.in.

faqs.q: Can I change my address after placing the order?
faqs.a: Address changes are only possible before the order is shipped. Contact support immediately.

faqs.q: My order shows delivered but I did not receive it.
faqs.a: Please check with security or neighbors. If still missing, contact us for investigation.

faqs.q: Will I get WhatsApp updates for my order?
faqs.a: Yes, if WhatsApp notifications are enabled in your Cureza account settings.

faqs.q: Why is my order split into multiple shipments?
faqs.a: Items from different vendors ship separately. Each vendor handles their own logistics.

faqs.q: Can I check my delivery partner details?
faqs.a: Yes, courier details are visible in the tracking section once dispatched.

faqs.q: Can someone else receive my package?
faqs.a: Yes, delivery is allowed to family/neighbors if they confirm your name and OTP.

faqs.q: What happens if delivery fails?
faqs.a: Courier will attempt delivery again. If still unsuccessful, contact Cureza support.

faqs.q: How can I cancel my order?
faqs.a: Go to "My Orders" and request cancellation before the vendor ships your item.

faqs.q: Can I cancel a shipped order?
faqs.a: No, shipped orders cannot be cancelled. You may refuse delivery if needed.

faqs.q: Will I get a refund for cancelled orders?
faqs.a: Yes, refunds for prepaid orders are processed within 5–7 working days.

faqs.q: Can a vendor cancel my order?
faqs.a: Yes, if the vendor faces stock issues or quality concerns. You will be refunded.

faqs.q: Can I cancel one item from a multi-item order?
faqs.a: Yes, cancellation is available per item if not yet shipped.

faqs.q: How do I know if my cancellation was successful?
faqs.a: You will receive an SMS/email confirmation from Cureza.

faqs.q: Can I cancel a COD order?
faqs.a: Yes, COD orders can be cancelled before dispatch.

faqs.q: What if I accidentally cancelled my order?
faqs.a: You will need to place a new order. Cancelled orders cannot be revived.

faqs.q: Why was my cancellation request rejected?
faqs.a: It may be because the vendor has already shipped the product.

faqs.q: Who should I contact for cancellation support?
faqs.a: Email us anytime at help@cureza.in — we offer 24/7 support.

title: Shipping & Delivery
description: Understand shipping charges, timelines, and courier partners.

faqs.q: What are the shipping charges?
faqs.a: Shipping is free for orders above ₹499. Below that, a flat ₹40 charge applies.

faqs.q: Do vendors charge additional fees?
faqs.a: No, Cureza standardizes shipping fees for all vendors.

faqs.q: Do you ship internationally?
faqs.a: Currently, we only deliver within India.

faqs.q: Is COD included in shipping?
faqs.a: COD has an additional small convenience fee depending on seller policies.

faqs.q: Why do some items have free shipping?
faqs.a: Some vendors offer free shipping promotions.

faqs.q: Will I see shipping charges before placing an order?
faqs.a: Yes, shipping charges appear on the checkout page.

faqs.q: Are shipping charges refundable?
faqs.a: Shipping charges are refundable only for cancelled prepaid orders before dispatch.

faqs.q: Does Cureza offer express delivery?
faqs.a: Express delivery is available on selected products and vendors.

faqs.q: Why do shipping charges vary?
faqs.a: Charges depend on location, weight, and vendor logistics.

faqs.q: Can I get free shipping for multiple items?
faqs.a: Yes, if the combined cart amount exceeds ₹499.

faqs.q: When will I get my order?
faqs.a: Most orders arrive within 3–5 working days. Remote areas may take 7–9 days.

faqs.q: Why is delivery taking longer?
faqs.a: Vendor location, courier delays, holidays, or high-demand periods may affect delivery.

faqs.q: Can I schedule my delivery?
faqs.a: Scheduled delivery is not available yet but coming soon.

faqs.q: Which courier partners does Cureza use?
faqs.a: We ship with leading partners like Delhivery, BlueDart, Xpressbees, and Ekart.

faqs.q: How do I change the delivery date?
faqs.a: Contact the courier using the tracking link. Options depend on courier availability.

faqs.q: Do you deliver to rural areas?
faqs.a: Yes, Cureza delivers to 28,000+ pin codes across India.

faqs.q: Can I request contactless delivery?
faqs.a: Yes, mention it in delivery instructions or inform the courier.

faqs.q: What if I miss the delivery?
faqs.a: Couriers make up to 3 attempts before returning the order.

faqs.q: Can I check delivery time slots?
faqs.a: Time slots are visible on the tracking page if enabled by the courier.

faqs.q: Do you deliver on weekends?
faqs.a: Yes, most courier partners deliver on Saturdays and sometimes Sundays.

title: Returns & Refunds
description: Learn about returns, refunds, and replacement policies.

faqs.q: What is Cureza’s return policy?
faqs.a: Returns are accepted within 7 days for damaged, defective, or incorrect products.

faqs.q: Are all products returnable?
faqs.a: Personal care, health, hygiene and consumable items are non-returnable.

faqs.q: Can I return an item from a multi-vendor order?
faqs.a: Yes, returns are processed per-item depending on vendor policies.

faqs.q: How do I request a return?
faqs.a: Go to "My Orders" > Select Item > Request Return.

faqs.q: Do I need to keep the original packaging?
faqs.a: Yes, original packaging and unused condition is required for approval.

faqs.q: Who handles return pickups?
faqs.a: Cureza arranges pickup through courier partners.

faqs.q: Why was my return request rejected?
faqs.a: If the item shows signs of use, damage, or missing accessories.

faqs.q: Can I exchange the product instead?
faqs.a: Exchanges are vendor-specific and available on selected items.

faqs.q: What happens if courier cannot pick up my return?
faqs.a: We will reschedule the pickup at your convenience.

faqs.q: How can I contact support for returns?
faqs.a: Email help@cureza.in for 24/7 return assistance.

faqs.q: When will I receive my refund?
faqs.a: Refunds are processed within 48 hours of pickup and take 3–7 days to reflect.

faqs.q: Where will my refund be credited?
faqs.a: Refunds go back to the original payment method.

faqs.q: How do I track my refund?
faqs.a: You can check refund status in the "My Orders" or "Refunds" section.

faqs.q: I paid by COD. How will I get my refund?
faqs.a: Refunds for COD orders are sent via bank transfer or UPI.

faqs.q: My refund is delayed. What should I do?
faqs.a: Contact support with your order ID — help@cureza.in.

faqs.q: Will shipping charges be refunded?
faqs.a: Shipping charges are refunded only for cancelled prepaid orders before shipping.

faqs.q: Why is my refund partial?
faqs.a: If only certain items were returned or if they did not meet return conditions.

faqs.q: Can I change my refund mode?
faqs.a: Refund mode cannot be changed once initiated.

faqs.q: When do replacement refunds happen?
faqs.a: Replacement refunds are processed after quality check by the vendor.

faqs.q: Do vendors issue refunds?
faqs.a: Refunds are processed by Cureza to ensure fast and secure payouts.

title: My Account
description: Manage your Cureza profile, security, and preferences.

faqs.q: How do I update my profile details?
faqs.a: Go to My Account → Edit Profile → Save Changes.

faqs.q: How can I reset my password?
faqs.a: Use the "Forgot Password" option on the login page.

faqs.q: Can I change my mobile number?
faqs.a: Yes, you can update it in your account settings after OTP verification.

faqs.q: Is my personal data safe with Cureza?
faqs.a: Yes, Cureza uses industry-level encryption and privacy protection.

faqs.q: How do I delete my Cureza account?
faqs.a: Contact support at help@cureza.in to request account deletion.

faqs.q: How can I manage my addresses?
faqs.a: Under "Address Book", you can add, edit, or delete addresses.

faqs.q: Where can I see my saved payment methods?
faqs.a: Saved payment methods are available under "Payments & Wallet".

faqs.q: Can I enable 2-step verification?
faqs.a: Yes, 2-step login protection is available for extra security.

faqs.q: How do I view my past orders?
faqs.a: Simply visit "My Orders" in your account dashboard.

faqs.q: Can I recover my account if I forget my email?
faqs.a: Contact Cureza support with identity proof.

title: Payments
description: Payment options, failed transactions, and COD help.

faqs.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a: We accept UPI, Cards, Net Banking, Wallets, and Cash on Delivery.

faqs.q: Is Cash on Delivery available everywhere?
faqs.a: COD availability depends on your pin code and vendor settings.

faqs.q: My payment failed but money was deducted.
faqs.a: Refunds for failed payments are auto-processed within 2–4 business days.

faqs.q: Can I pay via Paytm or PhonePe?
faqs.a: Yes, all major UPI apps are supported.

faqs.q: Does Cureza offer EMI options?
faqs.a: EMI is available on selected bank cards during checkout.

faqs.q: Is there a Cureza Wallet?
faqs.a: Yes, refunds for COD orders are faster with Cureza Wallet.

faqs.q: Can I save my card info?
faqs.a: Yes, securely stored via RBI-approved tokenization.

faqs.q: Why is COD not available on some items?
faqs.a: High-value or fragile items may have COD disabled.

faqs.q: Do you charge extra for COD?
faqs.a: Some vendors may apply a small COD convenience fee.

faqs.q: Can I split payment using multiple methods?
faqs.a: Currently not supported.

title: Offers & Coupons
description: Apply coupons, earn rewards, and get vendor discounts.

faqs.q: How do I apply a coupon code?
faqs.a: Apply the code at checkout before completing the payment.

faqs.q: Why is my coupon not working?
faqs.a: It may be expired, product-restricted, or vendor-specific.

faqs.q: Can I use multiple coupons?
faqs.a: Only one coupon can be applied per order.

faqs.q: Do vendors offer separate coupons?
faqs.a: Yes, some vendors run exclusive promotions.

faqs.q: Find offers
faqs.a: Check the "Offers" section on the homepage.

faqs.q: Are coupons available on COD orders?
faqs.a: Yes, most coupons work on COD as well.

faqs.q: Can I apply a coupon after placing the order?
faqs.a: No, coupons must be applied before payment.

faqs.q: Do coupons work during sales?
faqs.a: Some coupons may be disabled during mega events.

faqs.q: Do vendor discounts apply automatically?
faqs.a: Yes, vendor-specific offers appear automatically at checkout.

faqs.q: Can I transfer unused coupons to another account?
faqs.a: No, coupons are non-transferable.

title: Safety & Trust
description: Your safety is our priority. 100% genuine products.

faqs.q: Are products on Cureza authentic?
faqs.a: Yes, all vendors are verified and products are sourced from authorized suppliers.

faqs.q: How does Cureza verify vendors?
faqs.a: We check GST, business licenses, product quality, and past performance.

faqs.q: Are payments secure?
faqs.a: Yes, we use encrypted payment gateways with RBI-compliant security.

faqs.q: Can I trust reviews on Cureza?
faqs.a: Reviews are from real customers who purchased the product.

faqs.q: Is my data safe?
faqs.a: We follow strict data protection standards and do not share personal data.

faqs.q: How do I report a fake product?
faqs.a: Send details to help@cureza.in and our team will take strict action.

faqs.q: Do vendors undergo quality checks?
faqs.a: Yes, Cureza monitors vendor performance regularly.

faqs.q: Is Cureza a registered company?
faqs.a: Yes, headquartered in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India.

faqs.q: How do I identify trusted sellers?
faqs.a: Look for “Verified Vendor” badge on product listings.

faqs.q: Does Cureza provide buyer protection?
faqs.a: Yes, Cureza ensures full protection for defective or incorrect items.

title: Doctor Consultation
description: Book online consultations with certified doctors.

faqs.q: How do I book a consultation?
faqs.a: Go to “Consult Doctor”, select a doctor, choose a time slot, and confirm the booking.

faqs.q: Are doctors verified?
faqs.a: Yes, all doctors on Cureza are certified and verified by our medical team.

faqs.q: Can I reschedule my consultation?
faqs.a: Yes, rescheduling is allowed up to 2 hours before the session.

faqs.q: Do doctors give prescriptions?
faqs.a: Yes, digital prescriptions are provided after your session.

faqs.q: Are consultations private?
faqs.a: All online sessions are encrypted and confidential.

faqs.q: How long does a consultation take?
faqs.a: Most sessions last 10–20 minutes depending on the doctor.

faqs.q: Is video calling necessary?
faqs.a: No, you can choose audio, video, or chat-based consultations.

faqs.q: Can I book for a family member?
faqs.a: Yes, simply mention patient details while booking.

faqs.q: What if the doctor misses the call?
faqs.a: Your session will be rescheduled or refunded.

faqs.q: How do I contact support for consultation issues?
faqs.a: Email us 24/7 at help@cureza.in.
